AiCoreMed Brand Logo — horizontal wordmark with ECG pulse motif
ECG Heartbeat Polyline — medical visual identity element in teal (#5DCAA5)
Tagline — GESTION MEDICA INTELIGENTE in light blue (#85B7EB)
Brand Color Palette — dark navy #0C1E30, teal #5DCAA5, light blue #85B7EB, white
PWA App Icon — blue gradient background + white medical cross + green AI checkmark badge
Stylized Medical Cross — white cross with 4-arm plus shape
AI Checkmark Badge — green circle (#10b981) with white check path, positioned top-right
Persistent Left Sidebar — 13 nav items, collapsible, dark theme, logo at top, admin section for role=admin
Sticky Top Header — hamburger menu (mobile), org avatar+name, sucursal selector, theme toggle, notifications bell, user profile dropdown
Main Scrollable Content Area — responsive padding, GatedContent wrapper, license footer
Compact Copyright Footer — year, tenant name, app version
Dark Sidebar Theme Pattern — navy background (#0C1E30), white/teal text, blue accent highlights, separators
shadcn/ui Card Component Pattern — hover-card, rounded-xl borders, bg-card, shadow transitions
Gradient Text Accents — gradient-text class for page titles (blue primary gradient)
Tabs Component Pattern — shadcn/ui Tabs with horizontal scrollable trigger list
Color-Coded Status Badges — emerald for confirmed, amber for pending, red for urgent/cancelled, blue for in-progress
KPI Card Grid Pattern — responsive grid (2 cols mobile, 3 cols tablet, 6 cols desktop) with color-coded icons and gradient accents
Kanban Board Pattern — drag-and-drop columns for workflow state management (pendientes → en_atencion → atendidos / cancelados)

hyperedges.label: WhatsApp Message Pipeline
hyperedges.description: End-to-end message processing: Twilio webhook → n8n WF-01 → Ollama Mistral AI Agent → Postgres Chat Memory → PostgreSQL logging

hyperedges.label: Multi-Layer Security Architecture
hyperedges.description: Eight-layer security model: HTTPS via Traefik → HTTP headers/rate limiting → NextAuth JWT+2FA → Zod validation → HMAC webhooks → Anti-jailbreak IA → Multi-tenant isolation → AES-256-GCM encryption

hyperedges.label: Feature Gating by Subscription Plan
hyperedges.description: Feature gating system: lib/planes.ts canonical source → lib/features.ts gating logic → GatedContent component enforces plan-based access → MercadoPago subscriptions update user plan
